summary_en: 2,100,000 shares (1.56% of issued shares outstanding), ¥10.5B upper limit, execution window May 18, 2026 – March 31, 2027, method not specified. Reason: flexible capital management in response to changes in operating environment.
title_en: Notice on Determination of Matters Related to Acquisition of Treasury Stock (Acquisition of treasury stock pursuant to Articles of Incorporation based on Companies Act Article 165(2))
translation_en_brief: Nissan Chemical's board of directors resolved on May 15, 2026 to acquire up to 2,100,000 treasury shares (1.56% of issued shares excluding treasury stock) for a maximum aggregate purchase price of ¥10.5 billion. The acquisition period runs from May 18, 2026 through March 31, 2027. The company cited the need to execute flexible capital management in response to changes in its operating environment. As of the resolution date, the company held 559,252 treasury shares (excluding 127,000 shares held by a share-grant trust), against 134,240,748 issued shares outstanding.
